name: Local Thickness Mapping and Analysis
description: Perform a local thickness analysis on the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image to characterize structural width. Create a binary mask of the objects and compute a 32-bit local thickness map where pixel values represent thickness. Save the thickness map to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/thickness_map.tif. Analyze the thickness distribution and save a CSV file containing the summary statistics (Mean, StdDev, Min, Max) to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/thickness_distribution.csv.
